label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked from 29-rider breakaway on final categorized climb, dropped SIVAKOV and VERONA to win solo for DSM.
tactical_patterns: DSM infiltrated breakaway with THREE riders including Bardet, letting Storer conserve while teammates worked before final climb.
Movistar attacked GC group mid-stage despite 29-rider break holding 5min, revealing aggressive red jersey strategy before Valverde crash.
PALANCE Jan briefly held virtual red in break but faded, missing jersey by only 8sec as GC group controlled.
SIVAKOV chain drop on his attack allowed Storer counter, highlighting mechanical risk of early solo moves before final climb.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: DSM tactical discipline allowing him to hide while teammates worked paid off on 14-16% ramps
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: controlled stage despite 29-rider break with multiple GC threats, extended gaps on some rivals
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: led favorites group home, looks strong contrary to early-race expectations
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: crashed out on descent with shoulder damage mid-Movistar attack, potentially ending career at 41
rider_signals.SIVIKOV Pavel: negative: mechanical on his attack proved fatal, faded badly on final climb despite early aggression
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: neutral: reached Storer/Sivakov group late but couldn't match Storer on steep ramps
rider_signals.PALANCE Jan: negative: held virtual red but faded on final climbs, missing jersey by 8sec reveals insufficient depth
rider_signals.LANDER BOUWMANS Lennert: negative: in breakaway but cracked badly, suggesting form issues
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: in breakaway but suffered, concerning for GC ambitions
